subscriptions.description: Niklas Paschburg is a composer, pianist, and producer from Hamburg, Germany. He began playing piano in primary school and inherited his grandfather’s Hohner accordion, which still features in his recordings. As a teenager, he discovered electronic music and started blending classical piano with modern production. Living in an artist commune with Hannes Kretzer, founder of Unperceived Records, he released his debut EP Tuur mang Welten, a highlight of the “Neo-Contemporary” movement. Soon after, 7K! Records released his acclaimed albums Oceanic (2018), Svalbard (2020), and Panta Rhei (2023), leading to extensive touring across Europe. In 2025, following his ambient EP Mexican Alps—created in Mexico and Switzerland—Niklas embarks on a new chapter with a solo piano tour launching this November and new releases ahead.

20VC, hosted by Harry Stebbings, takes you inside the world of Venture Capital, Startup Funding and The Pitch. Join Harry and discover how you can attain funding for your business by listening to what the most prominent investors are directly looking for in startups, providing easily actionable tips and tricks that can be put in place to increase your chances of getting funded. The Twenty Minute VC also provides an instructional guide as to what it takes to get employed in the Venture Capital industry, with VCs giving specific advice on how to get noticed from the crowd and increasing your chances of employment. Our amazing Venture Capitalists also provide their analysis of the current technology market, providing advice and suggestions on the latest investing trends and predictions. Join us so you can see how you can get big, powerful improvements, fast.

Welcome to Bravos Research! We’re here to help you profit from global markets with trade ideas, data-driven market analysis and education.

Our mission is to always strive to understand markets and achieve superior returns.

Our investment strategy combines macro and technical analysis. We look at economic data and signals from stocks, currencies, and credit markets. Technical analysis helps us time the market, ensuring we make each decision with the highest probability of success.

But profitable trading isn’t just about great research. We believe having the right mindset is just as important to being a successful trader. Many of the well-known Wall Street strategists fail to be profitable because they let emotions take control and can’t manage risk.
That’s why we help our clients manage their psychology, risk management, and develop discipline.

Our goal is to give you both the edge and the mindset to consistently profit from markets.

Visit https://www.bravosresearch.com

Who will own the future of AI? Big Tech giants? Maybe. But what if people could own AI?

That is the promise of decentralized AI.

The People’s AI is a podcast for in-depth conversations on decentralized data markets, on-chain AI agents, decentralized AI compute (DePIN), AI DAOs, and the intersection of crypto and AI.

Hosted by Jeff Wilser, veteran tech journalist (from WIRED to TIME to CoinDesk), host of the AI-Curious podcast, and lead producer of Consensus’ AI Summit.

Season 3 of The People’s AI is presented by Vana.

🎧 Listen to all episodes and platforms via the Linktree: https://linktr.ee/thepeoplesai
